steps.title: Identify the goal and key similarity
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a similarity between the two positions. The notes describe first position (Vaganova) and demi-seconde (Royal Academy) — what do they have in common? Both are arm positions in classical ballet methods.

steps.title: Apply the key similarity to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A identifies what both positions share: they are “positions for the dancer's arms.”
  • B wrongly places first position in Royal Academy
  • C emphasizes differences
  • D skips the comparison
. That matches choice A — A is correct.
